comments: Approved based on commit 301ca62 evidence: tasks/v0.4-* and tasks/v0.5-* were moved via R100 renames into .archive/tasks/v0.5-archive/; docs/*.md and protocol/*.md were modified in place (M) rather than deleted; no tasks/v0.6-* artifacts were modified beyond the two allowed additions tasks/v0.6-m6-b-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.6-m6-b-result-review-packet.json; and the commit shows no directory deletions.
